summary: This checkpoint connects the W1450 field-data route to the W1625 full-data direct-localization boundary. W1450 constructs the W987 full-data provider from 4 provider-package inputs, and W1625 consumes that provider directly after eliminating the W1007 wrapper. This is not product success because the 4 W1450 inputs remain caller-supplied and no nullary OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess declaration is introduced.
obligations_discharged: Added W1450 field-data conversion to the W1625 one-input full-data direct-localization boundary input.
Added W1450 field-data stable-package bridge through W1625 and the canonical direct-localization boundary.
Added OriginalFourTaskProductData constructors and projection/equality lemmas for the W1450-through-W1625 route.
Updated RequiredDeclarations to check the new bounded-derived bridge and ProductData surfaces.
obligations_derived_or_eliminated: The ProductData frontier is reduced from the W1479 62-field surface to the W1450 4-input field-data surface.
The W1450-constructed W987 full-data provider now feeds the W1625 boundary that has already eliminated the W1007 branch-full-data wrapper.
The new ProductData surface is connected to the canonical direct-localization boundary without going through W1479/W1490/W1496.
known_gaps: No declaration currently defines OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess or originalFourTaskProductSuccess.
No nullary W1450 field-data input or W987 full-data provider was constructed.
The W1450 field-data input still packages W716 boundary data, W717 relation data, W984 target/closed-embedding closedness data, and W950 normalized-source/endpoint-localized-unit data.
Typeclass synthesis still does not provide a nullary bounded-derived stable package for MetrizableLCA.
remaining_work: Construct a mathematically honest nullary W1450 field-data input from true smaller providers, or identify the exact missing source theorem/API for each W1450 provider package.
Use a nullary W987 provider to build the bounded-derived stable package and then the original four-task product success witness.
Run the Tier C review packet and full contract audit before permitting update_goal complete.
